2606.24347.title: MVG-KAN: Multi-View Geo-Wind Guided KAN for PM$_{2.5}$ Forecasting
2606.24347.paper_summary: Accurate short-term PM$_{2.5}$ forecasting is important for public health protection, air-quality early warning, and urban environmental management. However, PM$_{2.5}$ variation is driven by multiple coupled factors, including stable periodic changes induced by human activities and meteorological regularity, station-specific short-term concentration evolution, and meteorology-driven pollutant dispersion among monitoring stations. Existing spatio-temporal forecasting methods may capture station relationships to some extent, but distance-only, correlation-based, or purely adaptive graphs are often insufficient to comprehensively represent these heterogeneous factors, especially wind-direction-dependent pollutant transport. To address this problem, we propose a Multi-View Geo-Wind Guided KAN model for PM$_{2.5}$ forecasting, named \textbf{MVG-KAN}, which models station-level PM$_{2.5}$ evolution from three complementary views: local periodic regularity, station-wise residual temporal dynamics, and meteorological-environment-guided spatial dispersion. Specifically, the periodic-residual forecasting backbone first separates stable daily and weekly patterns from non-periodic residual variations. A Geo-Wind Graph is constructed by combining geographic distance decay with wind-direction- and wind-speed-aware transport, providing a lightweight physically motivated directed spatial prior for residual propagation among stations. In addition, a temporal Kolmogorov-Arnold network (TKAN) residual head is then introduced to learn station-wise nonlinear autoregressive correction from de-periodized PM$_{2.5}$ residuals and historical multi-pollutant sequences, thereby enhancing the modeling of local residual inertia and pollutant co-variation.
2606.24347.paper_summary_zh: 準確的短期 PM$_{2.5}$ 預測對於公共健康保護、空氣質量預警和城市環境管理至關重要。<lb/>然而，PM$_{2.5}$ 的變化受到多個耦合因素的驅動，包括人類活動引起的穩定週期性變化和氣象規律、特定站點的短期濃度演變以及氣象驅動的污染物在監測站之間的擴散。<lb/>現有的時空預測方法在某種程度上可能捕捉到站點之間的關係，但僅基於距離的、相關性基礎的或純粹自適應的圖形往往不足以全面代表這些異質因素，特別是依賴風向的污染物運輸。<lb/>為了解決這個問題，我們提出了一種多視角地理風引導 KAN 模型，用於 PM$_{2.5}$ 預測，命名為 \textbf{MVG-KAN}，該模型從三個互補的視角建模站點級 PM$_{2.5}$ 演變：局部週期性規律、站點特定的殘差時間動態以及氣象環境引導的空間擴散。<lb/>具體而言，週期-殘差預測骨幹首先將穩定的日常和每週模式與非週期性殘差變化分開。<lb/>通過結合地理距離衰減與風向和風速感知的運輸，構建了一個地理風圖，為站點之間的殘差傳播提供了一個輕量級的、物理驅動的有向空間先驗。<lb/>此外，然後引入一個時間科爾莫哥洛夫-阿諾德網絡（TKAN）殘差頭，以從去週期化的 PM$_{2.5}$ 殘差和歷史多污染物序列中學習站點特定的非線性自回歸修正，從而增強對局部殘差慣性和污染物共變化的建模。
2606.24347.author: Cheng Huang et.al.
2606.24347.authors: Cheng Huang, Muyao Guan, Jairus Yougui Railey, Ning Xu, Honghui Xu, Changjiang Zhang, Zhen Zhang, Shiqing Zhang, Cong Bai
